project_type: React + TypeScript board game adaptation with Express 5 + WebSocket server
test_command: npm run build (no test runner, validation is build-only)
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compiles and Vite bundles successfully
environment_constraints: Open internet available. No test runner configured. Server runs with npx tsx src/server/index.ts on port 3001.
key_patterns: Zustand store with gameState. Server handlers use case statements with broadcastState(l). Ready-check pattern: array of playerIds who accepted, broadcast when all ready. Online flow: client sends action via ws, server mutates gameState and broadcasts. createPortal(jsx, document.body) for global modals. CSS in single App.css file.
directory_structure: src/utils/gameLogic.ts (3699 lines, all game logic functions), src/server/index.ts (1543 lines, Express+WS server), src/store/gameStore.ts (3226 lines, Zustand store + WS handlers), src/types/game.ts (types/constants), src/components/ (all React components), src/i18n/ (translations)
